positive: A vibrant cyberpunk cityscape viewed through rain-slicked neon reflections. Flying vehicles, dense vertical architecture, holographic advertisements, dark tones contrasted with electric blue and magenta neon glow. Cinematic, highly detailed, gritty.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, pastoral, soft lighting, sepia, natural elements
